metadata.title: Regionlock data-residency evidence: EU Data Residency & Sovereignty Baseline

results.title: Regionlock scan of testdata/violating
results.description: Compliance score 0% (0 pass / 9 fail / 0 skip across 9 checks).

findings.title: Storage uses customer-managed keys
findings.description: Storage uses customer-managed keys: 0 pass / 1 fail / 0 skip. Remediation: Use a customer-managed key: annotate the PVC with regionlock.io/cmk-key-id=<kms-key-id>, or use a StorageClass whose parameters set a CMK (kmsKeyId, diskEncryptionSetID, or disk-encryption-kms-key).

findings.title: Encryption at rest declared
findings.description: Encryption at rest declared: 0 pass / 1 fail / 0 skip. Remediation: Declare encryption at rest: label the PVC regionlock.io/encrypted="true", or use an approved encrypted StorageClass listed in approvedStorageClasses.

findings.title: Workloads pinned to an EU region
findings.description: Workloads pinned to an EU region: 0 pass / 3 fail / 0 skip. Remediation: Pin the workload to an in-territory region: set topology.kubernetes.io/region (via nodeSelector, or a required nodeAffinity In term on EVERY term) to one of the ruleset's allow-listed regions. On a single-region cluster, set clusterRegion instead of labelling every workload.

findings.title: No unrestricted or extra-EU egress
findings.description: No unrestricted or extra-EU egress: 0 pass / 4 fail / 0 skip. Remediation: Keep traffic in-territory: drop Service type=ExternalName and spec.externalIPs, and replace unrestricted NetworkPolicy egress (0.0.0.0/0, ::/0, or 0.0.0.0/1 + 128.0.0.0/1 splits) with explicit in-territory CIDRs.
